title: Original Prism Composition
attribution: Created for UI-UX-Skill; reusable within this repository under its MIT distribution.

visual_traits.hierarchy: left-anchored narrative with one depth focal point
visual_traits.typography: high-contrast display paired with neutral interface text
visual_traits.depth_strategy: one product-like prism, ambient light, no decorative card grid
visual_traits.motion_strategy: optional slow camera drift; primary content remains static and readable

accessibility_notes: The composition is supplementary; the headline and action are semantic HTML.
Color is not the only indicator of state.
Motion may be disabled without changing access to content.
